name: @a2r/browser
description: A2R Browser Automation and Canvas Hosting

scripts.start:browser: tsx -e "import { startBrowserServer } from './src/index.js'; startBrowserServer({ config: { enabled: true, controlPort: 9222, headless: false, noSandbox: false, attachOnly: false, profiles: { default: { name: 'default', cdpPort: 9222, cdpUrl: 'http://127.0.0.1:9222' } } } }); console.log('Browser server on http://127.0.0.1:9222')"
scripts.start:canvas: tsx -e "import { startCanvasHost } from './src/index.js'; startCanvasHost({ port: 8080, liveReload: true }).then(h => console.log('Canvas host on http://localhost:8080'));"
